tagline: 60+ Years of Moving Done Right — No Deposits, No Contractors
hero_subtitle: Boston's most experienced moving company. Local, long-distance, and international moves with company employees — never contractors. Free on-site estimates.
service_area_description: Serving Boston, Massachusetts, New Hampshire, Rhode Island, and nationwide — plus international destinations.
seo_title: Boston Moving Services | 60+ Years Experience | Boston, MA Movers
seo_description: Boston Moving Services: 60+ years of professional moving. Local, long-distance, international, and lab equipment moves. No deposits, company employees only.
services_subtitle: Full-service moving company — residential, commercial, lab equipment, and international. All crew are company employees, never contractors.
reviews_subtitle: Six decades of experience, thousands of happy customers, and a reputation built on doing things right.
cta_heading: 60 years in the game. Zero deposits required.
cta_subtitle: Get a free on-site estimate — fully guaranteed. No deposit, no contractors, just Boston's most experienced moving crew.
footer_description: Boston's most experienced moving company — local, long-distance, and international moves since the 1960s.

services_featured.name: Local Moving
services_featured.description: Residential and apartment moves across Boston, MA, NH, and RI with company-employed crews.

services_secondary.name: Long Distance & International Moving
services_secondary.description: Nationwide and international relocations with guaranteed on-site estimates and no deposits required.

services_accent.name: Laboratory Equipment Moving
services_accent.description: Specialized lab and medical equipment moving with custom techniques and climate-controlled storage.

services_wide.name: Storage & Commercial Moving
services_wide.description: Storage for furniture, vehicles, and personal property plus full commercial office relocations.

about_features.title: Company Employees Only
about_features.description: Every driver and crew member is a company employee — no contractors, no temps, no surprises.

about_features.title: No Deposits Required
about_features.description: Payment collected on delivery morning. Free on-site estimates that are fully guaranteed.

about_features.title: Lab & Medical Specialists
about_features.description: Specialized equipment and techniques for laboratory and medical facility relocations.

reviews.name: Kirk Wynn
reviews.text: These guys helped us move last minute. Boston Moving was straight forward from the beginning — honest and professional.

reviews.name: Sammantha Jones
reviews.text: Overall a great experience. The pricing was fair and the staff was informative and stayed in contact throughout the whole process.

reviews.name: Research Director
reviews.text: They moved our entire lab — sensitive equipment and all — without a single issue. 60 years of experience shows.
